Original: AtG is a turn-based game. Each turn, [Resources|RESOURCE] are [Produced|PRODUCE] and [Consumed|CONSUME], and [Units|UNIT] may [Move|MOVE-POINT] a certain distance. Once all possible actions have been taken the player must end their turn and allow the other (computer) players to make their moves.
Translation: AtG 是一款回合制游戏。每个[回合|TURN]，[资源|RESOURCE]会被[产出|PRODUCE]和[消耗|CONSUME]，[单位|UNIT]可以[移动|MOVE-POINT]一定距离。完成所有可行动作后，玩家必须结束回合，让其他电脑玩家行动。
Note: Turn concept tooltip description visible from the knowledge screen footer.

Original: A Clan is a group of [Families|FAMILY] which act as a single unit. Each Clan can be [Trained|TRAIN] in a [Profession|PROFESSION] in order to grant it the ability to [Harvest|HARVEST] or refine [Resources|RESOURCE], explore the map, [Fight|WARRIOR] enemies, and more. You will usually end up with around 40-50 Clans over the course of a single game.
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]由若干[家庭|FAMILY]组成，作为一个单位行动。每个氏族都可以被[训练|TRAIN]为某个[职业|PROFESSION]，从而[收获|HARVEST]或加工[资源|RESOURCE]、探索地图、[作战|WARRIOR]等。一局游戏通常会拥有约40到50个氏族。
Note: Common concept tooltip exposed by main-loop clan/support hover.

Original: [Clans|CLAN] can develop a Desire based on their [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT], for example a Clan with the 'Easily Cold' Trait will likely [become unhappy|MOOD] if [Trained|TRAIN] as an [EXPLORER] and sent off during the winter.[BLANK-LINE]The longer a Clan has a Desire which hasn't been fulfilled the more their [Mood|MOOD] can drop. Ignoring a Clan's Desire can be done, but this is generally not advised. Satisfying a Clan's Desire will result in it receiving a permanent Mood bonus.[BLANK-LINE][Feuds|FEUD] are a special type of Desire where two Clans decide they hate each other and want you to [Punish|PUNISH] the other. Once a Feud has begun you will likely need to intervene.[BLANK-LINE]Most Clans will never develop a Desire, so this isn't something you'll need to spend too much time or energy dealing with. Pay attention to your Clans' Traits though, as some especially troublesome Clans are usually pretty easy to spot!
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]可能因自身[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]产生愿望。例如，拥有“畏寒”特质的氏族若在冬季被[训练|TRAIN]为[探险者|EXPLORER]并派往野外，很可能[不满|MOOD]。[BLANK-LINE]氏族的愿望拖得越久，[心情|MOOD]可能下降越多。你可以无视愿望，但通常不建议这样做。满足愿望会带来永久的心情加成。[BLANK-LINE][世仇|FEUD]是一类特殊愿望：两个氏族彼此敌视，并希望你[惩罚|PUNISH]对方。世仇开始后通常需要干预。[BLANK-LINE]多数氏族不会产生愿望，因此不必花太多精力处理。但仍应留意氏族特质，因为特别麻烦的氏族往往很容易看出来。
Note: Common Desire concept tooltip exposed by clan trait hover.

Original: [Clans|CLAN] with certain negative [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT] like 'Aggressive' or 'Rowdy' can sometimes commit a Crime. This doesn't have any tangible effect other than making all other Clans on their tile [unhappy|MOOD].[BLANK-LINE]The negative effects of having committed one or more Crimes can be eliminated by [Punishing|PUNISH] the offending Clan. Another option is to plan ahead and actively shuffle potentially troublesome Clans off into [Active|ACTIVE] Professions away from other Clans.
Translation: 带有某些负面[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]的[氏族|CLAN]，例如“好斗”或“粗野”，有时会犯下罪行。除了让同一地格上的其他氏族[不满|MOOD]外，罪行没有其他直接效果。[BLANK-LINE]通过[惩罚|PUNISH]犯事氏族，可以消除一项或多项罪行带来的负面影响。另一种做法是提前安排，把可能惹事的氏族调去远离其他氏族的[主动|ACTIVE]职业。
Note: Common Crime concept tooltip exposed by clan trait hover.

Original: You can Punish a [Clan|CLAN] in your [SETTLEMENT] after it's committed a [Crime|CRIME] or become involved in a [Feud|FEUD]. Doing so settles the matter and any associated penalties, but strips the Clan of their [Profession|PROFESSION] and [Discipline|DISCIPLINE], and gives them a permanent [Mood|MOOD] penalty.
Translation: 当[氏族|CLAN]犯下[罪行|CRIME]或卷入[世仇|FEUD]后，你可以在[定居点|SETTLEMENT]中[惩罚|PUNISH]它。这样会了结事件并清除相关惩罚，但也会移除该氏族的[职业|PROFESSION]和[纪律|DISCIPLINE]，并给予永久[心情|MOOD]惩罚。
Note: Common Punish concept tooltip exposed by clan trait/button hover.

Original: Move your cursor over any yellow text to learn more about the game concept - even from [inside other tooltips!|TOOLTIPS]

Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifier.

Original: There are 2 [ways to win|WINNING] in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*] Conquering the [Capital City|CAPITAL] of one of the two [Roman Empire Factions|ROME].[BLANK-LINE][*] Becoming 'Magister Militum' and taking over [Rome|ROME] from within by sending five [Clans|CLAN] to become Roman Legions.[BLANK-LINE]Note that there are two Roman [Factions|FACTION]: the Eastern and Western halves of the previously-whole-in-better-days Roman Empire, and either one can satisfy your [Victory Conditions|WINNING].[BLANK-LINE]Conquering a Roman capital will require locating it on the map and significant military preparation. Although various setbacks will befall the Romans they start off quite strong and can put up quite a fight.[BLANK-LINE]Becoming Magister Militum is more of an economic victory, as to send a [Clan|CLAN] to [Rome|ROME] not only means sending it off for a year but also providing it with expensive, late-game equipment.
Translation: AtG 中有 2 种[胜利方式|WINNING]：[BLANK-LINE][*]征服两个[罗马帝国派系|ROME]之一的[首都|CAPITAL]。[BLANK-LINE][*]成为“军务长官”，派出五个[氏族|CLAN]成为罗马军团，从内部接管[罗马|ROME]。[BLANK-LINE]注意，罗马有两个[派系|FACTION]：曾经统一而强盛的罗马帝国分裂为东西两半，征服任一方都能满足你的[胜利条件|WINNING]。[BLANK-LINE]征服罗马首都需要先在地图上找到它，并进行充分的军事准备。罗马会遭遇各种挫折，但开局依旧强大，能打出相当顽强的抵抗。[BLANK-LINE]成为军务长官更接近经济胜利，因为派一个[氏族|CLAN]前往[罗马|ROME]不仅要让其离开一年，还要提供昂贵的后期装备。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers and layout tags.

Original: Caravans provide an opportunity to exchange [Resources|RESOURCE] you don't need for those you do.[BLANK-LINE]Caravans visit 3 times per year, in Late March, June, and September. Note that it does NOT  show up during the winter, so plan accordingly![BLANK-LINE]You can visit a Caravan by clicking the button at the top of the screen (after its arrived for the first time), clicking the Notification icon announcing its arrival, or presssing [HOTKEY:F2].
Translation: 商队提供机会，让你用不需要的[资源|RESOURCE]交换急需的资源。[BLANK-LINE]商队每年到访 3 次，分别在三月下旬、六月和九月。注意，商队不会在冬季出现，请提前规划！[BLANK-LINE]商队首次抵达后，你可以点击屏幕顶部按钮、点击商队到达的通知图标，或按 [HOTKEY:F2] 拜访商队。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers and hotkey tag.

Original: In addition to the major [Factions|FACTION] there are also a number of [Structures|STRUCTURE] owned independently by local people. They mind their own business, but their Structures and [Clans|CLAN] can be captured by a [Warrior|WARRIOR], should you defeat whatever defender is present.
Translation: 除了主要[派系|FACTION]外，还有一些由本地人独立拥有的[建筑|STRUCTURE]。他们通常只顾自己的事，但只要你击败当地守军，就可以用[战士|WARRIOR]夺取他们的建筑和[氏族|CLAN]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Each major [Faction|FACTION] has one or two special rules which make it play differently from the others. The Goths start with extra [FOOD] and [TREASURE], whereas the Huns start with a [HORSE-ARCHER] but can't own [Structures|STRUCTURE].
Translation: 每个主要[派系|FACTION]都有一两条特殊规则，使其玩法不同于其他派系。哥特人开局拥有额外的 [FOOD] 和 [TREASURE]，而匈人开局拥有一支 [HORSE-ARCHER]，但不能拥有[建筑|STRUCTURE]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Every playable [Faction|FACTION] Leader has a unique [Personality|LEADER-TRAIT] which greatly shapes their behavior, particularly their Approach towards you.[BLANK-LINE]Refer to the 'Diplomacy' tip in the Help Screen ([HOTKEY:?]) for more information.
Translation: 每个可玩[派系|FACTION]领袖都有独特的[性格|LEADER-TRAIT]，会显著影响其行为，尤其是他们对你的态度。[BLANK-LINE]更多信息请查看帮助界面（[HOTKEY:?]）中的“外交”提示。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers and hotkey tag.

Original: Each Leader has two 'Personality Traits', which helps shape which diplomatic [Approaches|APPROACH] and [Interactions|INTERACTION] they choose.
Translation: 每位领袖都有两个“性格特质”，它们会影响其选择哪些外交[态度|APPROACH]和[互动|INTERACTION]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Borders, or Control, represents the [Tiles|TILE] which a player has direct ownership over and appears as a solid, colored line on the map.[BLANK-LINE]Control is very important, as within it your [Units|UNIT] always have full [Supply|SUPPLY], and it allows [Structures|STRUCTURE] to be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT], which far exceed foraging in their economic ouput.[BLANK-LINE]Control can be expanded by spending [WEAPONS] to [Fortify|FORTIFY] a Structure. [WATCHTOWER:S] are the one type of Structure which can be built outside of your Control, giving you the ability to project your power at a distance, should you be willing to make the investment.
Translation: 边界，也就是控制范围，代表玩家直接拥有的[地格|TILE]，在地图上显示为实心彩色边线。[BLANK-LINE]控制范围非常重要：在其中你的[单位|UNIT]始终拥有完整[补给|SUPPLY]，并且可以[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]；建筑的经济产出远胜于采集。[BLANK-LINE]你可以花费 [WEAPONS] 来[加固|FORTIFY]建筑，从而扩大控制范围。[WATCHTOWER:S] 是唯一可以建在控制范围外的建筑；只要愿意投入，它能让你的力量投射到远方。
Note: Trial Common concept-help body; preserve concept identifiers and layout tags.

Original: Maps in AtG are divided into a grid of hex tiles.[BLANK-LINE]You can show or hide the grid by pressing [HOTKEY:G], and pressing [HOTKEY:1] will make it darker or lighter.
Translation: AtG 的地图由六边形地格组成。[BLANK-LINE]按 [HOTKEY:G] 可以显示或隐藏网格，按 [HOTKEY:1] 可以让网格变深或变浅。
Note: Trial Common concept-help map/grid body; preserve hotkey tags.

Original: Each [Tile|TILE] is comprised of at least one type of Terrain and some can have up to four or five.[BLANK-LINE][FERTILE:S], [DRY:S], and [DESERT:S] are 'base' Terrain types which can be found by themselves. A Tile can also have [HILL:S] or vegetation like a [Forest|FOREST] or [BRUSH-LEAFY].[BLANK-LINE]Tiles can also be affected by [Weather|WEATHER] and become [FLOODED] or [SCORCHED]. During the winter a Tile's base Terrain usually becomes [Cold|COLD], and may even turn into [SNOW].
Translation: 每个[地格|TILE]至少包含一种地形，有些地格可包含四五种。[BLANK-LINE][FERTILE:S]、[DRY:S] 和 [DESERT:S] 是可以单独出现的“基础”地形。地格也可以有 [HILL:S]，或像[森林|FOREST]、[BRUSH-LEAFY] 这样的植被。[BLANK-LINE]地格还会受[天气|WEATHER]影响，变成 [FLOODED] 或 [SCORCHED]。冬季时，地格的基础地形通常会变为[寒冷|COLD]，甚至可能变为 [SNOW]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help terrain body; preserve terrain/deposit tags.

Original: Water is an impassable [Terrain|TERRAIN] type. [SETTLEMENT:S] next to large enough bodies of water can build [GALLEY:S].
Translation: 水域是一种不可通行的[地形|TERRAIN]。[SETTLEMENT:S] 若毗邻足够大的水体，可以建造 [GALLEY:S]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help water body; preserve tags.

Original: Rivers are a major [Terrain|TERRAIN] barrier. Normally, crossing Small Rivers is difficult and Large Rivers is impossible, but Rivers can freeze in the winter and become as easy to cross as flat ground.
Translation: 河流是重要的[地形|TERRAIN]障碍。通常，小河难以跨越，大河无法跨越；但河流会在冬季结冰，届时穿越它们会像穿越平地一样容易。
Note: Trial Common concept-help river body; preserve concept identifier.

Translation: 道路能让[军队|ARMY]无视[地格|TILE]上由[地形|TERRAIN]和[季节|SEASON]造成的[移动|MOVE-POINT]惩罚。
Note: Trial Common concept-help road body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: The temperature of [Tiles|TILE] change throughout the year and in the winter they will usually become Cold. This shuts down the [Production|PRODUCE] of [Plants|PLANT] by [Farms|FARM] and [Foragers|FORAGE], and usually forces you to subsist off of the [FOOD] you've [Stored|STORED-TURN] earlier in the year.
Translation: [地格|TILE]温度会随一年变化，冬季通常会变得寒冷。这会停止[农场|FARM]和[采集者|FORAGE]对[植物|PLANT]的[产出|PRODUCE]，通常迫使你依靠年内早些时候[储存|STORED-TURN]的[FOOD]维持生计。

Original: The temperature of [Tiles|TILE] change throughout the year and in the winter they will usually become Cold. This shuts down the [Production|PRODUCE] of [Plants|PLANT] by [Farms|FARM] and [Foragers|FORAGE], and usually forces you to subsist off of the [FOOD] you've [Stored|STORED-TURN] earlier in the year.
Translation: [地格|TILE]温度会随一年变化，冬季通常会变得寒冷。这会停止[农场|FARM]和[采集者|FORAGE]对[植物|PLANT]的[产出|PRODUCE]，通常迫使你依靠年内早些时候[储存|STORED-TURN]的[FOOD]维持生计。

Original: Extreme Weather can affect [Tiles|TILE] in a variety of ways. In the summer particularly hot Tiles can become [SCORCHED], in the winter [BLIZZARD:S] can strike, and throughout the year [RAIN] can strike and when particularly intense Tiles can become [FLOODED].
Translation: 极端天气会以多种方式影响[地格|TILE]。夏季特别炎热的地格可能变为[SCORCHED]，冬季可能遭遇[BLIZZARD:S]，全年都可能降下[RAIN]；雨势特别强时，地格会变为[FLOODED]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help extreme weather body; preserve raw weather tags.

Original: A Unit is a [Clan|CLAN] in an [Active|ACTIVE] [Profession|PROFESSION] which can [Move|MOVE-POINT] around between map [Tiles|TILE].
Translation: 单位是处于[主动|ACTIVE][职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]，可以在地图[地格|TILE]之间[移动|MOVE-POINT]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help unit body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: A 'Stack' is a group of [Units|UNIT] that move and act together.
Translation: “编队”是一组共同移动和行动的[单位|UNIT]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help stack body; preserve concept identifier.

Original: Armies are groups of [Clans|CLAN] in [Active|ACTIVE] [Professions|PROFESSION] which can [Move|MOVE-POINT] around between map [Tiles|TILE].
Translation: 军队是由处于[主动|ACTIVE][职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]组成的群体，可以在地图[地格|TILE]之间[移动|MOVE-POINT]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help army body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Structures are [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [Clans|CLAN] in [Active|ACTIVE] [Professions|PROFESSION], usually to [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] of some kind present on a map [Tile|TILE].[BLANK-LINE]Structures are much better at [Producing|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE] than [Foragers|FORAGE], and should be prioritized as soon as [TIMBER] and other sources of more advanced [Structure|STRUCTURE]-based [Resources|RESOURCE] are available.[BLANK-LINE]Advanced versions [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] from [STONE-BLOCKS] can be assigned [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to further increase their [Production|PRODUCE].
Translation: 建筑由处于[主动|ACTIVE][职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN][建造|CONSTRUCT]，通常用于[采收|HARVEST]地图[地格|TILE]上的某种[资源|RESOURCE]。[BLANK-LINE]建筑[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]的效率远高于[采集者|FORAGE]；一旦有[TIMBER]以及其他更高级的建筑型[资源|RESOURCE]来源，就应优先建设。[BLANK-LINE]用[STONE-BLOCKS]建造的高级版本可以分配[学徒|APPRENTICE]，进一步提高其[产出|PRODUCE]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help structure body; preserve concept identifiers and raw resource tags.

Original: All playable [Factions|FACTION] own only a single [SETTLEMENT], which serves as their Capital. Each of the two [Romans|ROME] Factions owns multiple Cities, one of which is their Capital (Rome for the West and Constantinople for the East). Capturing a Playable Faction's Capital is one way to unlock it so you can play as them in future games.
Translation: 所有可玩[派系|FACTION]都只拥有一个作为首都的[SETTLEMENT]。两个[罗马|ROME]派系各自拥有多座城市，其中一座是首都（西罗马为罗马，东罗马为君士坦丁堡）。占领一个可玩派系的首都，可以解锁该派系供以后开局使用。
Note: Trial Common concept-help capital body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Deposits are sources of [Resources|RESOURCE] you can [Harvest|HARVEST] with [Forager Units|FORAGE] like the [GATHERER], or by more advanced [Structures|STRUCTURE] like the [WHEAT-FARM-1]. All Deposits are visible at the start of a game, although you won't know the [identity|UNIDENTIFIED] of most of them.[BLANK-LINE][Foragers|FORAGE] and basic [Structures|STRUCTURE] constructed from [TIMBER] slowly [Degrade|DEGRADE] the Resources they're Harvesting, but those constructed from [STONE-BLOCKS] do not, making them very valuable long-term investments.[BLANK-LINE]There are 3 types of Deposits in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*][Plants|PLANT][END-LINE][*][Animals|ANIMAL][END-LINE][*][Minerals|MINERAL]
Translation: 资源点是[资源|RESOURCE]来源，可由[GATHERER]等[采集单位|FORAGE][采收|HARVEST]，也可由[WHEAT-FARM-1]等更高级的[建筑|STRUCTURE]利用。所有资源点在开局时都可见，但多数资源点的[身份|UNIDENTIFIED]尚不明确。[BLANK-LINE][采集者|FORAGE]和用[TIMBER]建造的基础[建筑|STRUCTURE]会慢慢[耗竭|DEGRADE]正在采收的资源；用[STONE-BLOCKS]建造的建筑则不会，因此是很有价值的长期投资。[BLANK-LINE]AtG 中有 3 类资源点：[BLANK-LINE][*][植物|PLANT][END-LINE][*][动物|ANIMAL][END-LINE][*][矿物|MINERAL]
Note: Trial Common concept-help deposit body; preserve concept identifiers and raw config tags.

Original: Deserted Locations can provide bonuses like free [Resources|RESOURCE], but only if investigated by [EXPLORER:A/AN]. It's also possible for some types to hide hidden danger, like [Bandits|BANDIT], so don't be too reckless!
Translation: 废弃地点可能提供免费的[资源|RESOURCE]等奖励，但必须由[EXPLORER:A/AN]调查。有些地点也可能暗藏[强盗|BANDIT]等危险，不要过于鲁莽。
Note: Trial Common concept-help deserted location body; preserve concept identifiers and raw grammar tag.

Original: Farms are a group of [Plant|PLANT]-[Producing|PRODUCE] [Structures|STRUCTURE] that include [WHEAT-FARM-1:S], [BARLEY-FARM-1:S], [FRUIT-FARM-1:S], [FLAX-FARM-1:S], [OLIVE-FARM-1:S], and [VINEYARD-1:S].
Translation: 农场是一组[产出|PRODUCE][植物|PLANT]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，包括[WHEAT-FARM-1:S]、[BARLEY-FARM-1:S]、[FRUIT-FARM-1:S]、[FLAX-FARM-1:S]、[OLIVE-FARM-1:S]和[VINEYARD-1:S]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help farm body; preserve raw structure tags.

Original: Mines are a group of [Mineral|MINERAL]-[Producing|PRODUCE] [Structures|STRUCTURE] that include [IRON-MINE-1:S], [COAL-MINE-1:S], [PEAT-MINE-1:S], [GOLD-MINE-1:S], [GEM-MINE-1:S], [SALT-MINE-1:S], and [STONE-QUARRY-1:S].
Translation: 矿场是一组[产出|PRODUCE][矿物|MINERAL]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，包括[IRON-MINE-1:S]、[COAL-MINE-1:S]、[PEAT-MINE-1:S]、[GOLD-MINE-1:S]、[GEM-MINE-1:S]、[SALT-MINE-1:S]和[STONE-QUARRY-1:S]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help mine body; preserve raw structure tags.

Original: Pastures are a group of [Structures|STRUCTURE] which add [Animals|ANIMAL] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] that include [CATTLE-PASTURE-1:S], [SHEEP-PASTURE-1:S], [PIG-PASTURE-1:S], and [HORSE-PASTURE-1:S].[BLANK-LINE]Pastures are [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S].
Translation: 牧场是一组会把[动物|ANIMAL]加入你[库存|STOCKPILE]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，包括[CATTLE-PASTURE-1:S]、[SHEEP-PASTURE-1:S]、[PIG-PASTURE-1:S]和[HORSE-PASTURE-1:S]。[BLANK-LINE]牧场由[RANCHER:S][建造|CONSTRUCT]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help pasture body; preserve raw structure/profession tags.

Original: Plants are one of the three types of [Deposits|DEPOSIT] in At the Gates ([Animals|ANIMAL] and [Minerals|MINERAL] being the other two).[BLANK-LINE]Like all Deposits, Plants can be [Harvested|HARVEST] to [Produce|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE], but most types must first be [Identified|UNIDENTIFIED] by a [GATHERER], [REAPER], or [SURVEYOR].[BLANK-LINE]There are 7 types of Plants in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S] (always Identified)[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FRUIT-TREES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S] (always Identified)[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BARLEY:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-OLIVES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GRAPES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FLAX:S]
Translation: 植物是 At the Gates 三类[资源点|DEPOSIT]之一，另外两类是[动物|ANIMAL]和[矿物|MINERAL]。[BLANK-LINE]与所有资源点一样，植物可以被[采收|HARVEST]来[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]，但多数类型必须先由[GATHERER]、[REAPER]或[SURVEYOR][识别|UNIDENTIFIED]。[BLANK-LINE]AtG 中有 7 类植物：[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S]（总是已识别）[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FRUIT-TREES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-WHEAT:S]（总是已识别）[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-BARLEY:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-OLIVES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GRAPES:S][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-FLAX:S]
Note: Trial Common concept-help plant body; preserve raw deposit/profession tags.

Original: Minerals are one of the three types of [Deposits|DEPOSIT] in At the Gates ([Animals|ANIMAL] and [Plants|PLANT] being the other two).[BLANK-LINE]Like all Deposits, Minerals can be [Harvested|HARVEST] to [Produce|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE], but all types must first be [Identified|UNIDENTIFIED] by a [DIGGER] or [SURVEYOR].[BLANK-LINE]There are 7 types of Minerals in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-IRON][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-STONE][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-COAL][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-PEAT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-SALT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GOLD][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GEMS]
Translation: 矿物是 At the Gates 三类[资源点|DEPOSIT]之一，另外两类是[动物|ANIMAL]和[植物|PLANT]。[BLANK-LINE]与所有资源点一样，矿物可以被[采收|HARVEST]来[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]，但所有类型都必须先由[DIGGER]或[SURVEYOR][识别|UNIDENTIFIED]。[BLANK-LINE]AtG 中有 7 类矿物：[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-IRON][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-STONE][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-COAL][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-PEAT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-SALT][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GOLD][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-GEMS]
Note: Trial Common concept-help mineral body; preserve raw deposit/profession tags.

Original: Animals are one of the three types of [Deposits|DEPOSIT] in At the Gates ([Plants|PLANT] and [Minerals|MINERAL] being the other two).[BLANK-LINE]Like all Deposits, Animals can be [Harvested|HARVEST] to [Produce|PRODUCE] [Resources|RESOURCE], but most types must first be [Identified|UNIDENTIFIED] by a [HUNTER], [TRAPPER], or [SURVEYOR].[BLANK-LINE]All types of Animals can be [Harvested|HARVEST] for [MEAT] by a [HUNTER] and [PARCHMENT] or [CLOTH] (as leather) by a [TRAPPER]. All Animals but [DEER] can be added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] and used by advanced [Professions|PROFESSION] like the [MEAT-CUTTER] and [PARCHMENT-MAKER].[BLANK-LINE]There are 5 types of Animals in AtG:[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-DEER] (always Identified)[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-HORSES][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-CATTLE][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-SHEEP][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-PIGS]
Translation: 动物是 At the Gates 三类[资源点|DEPOSIT]之一，另外两类是[植物|PLANT]和[矿物|MINERAL]。[BLANK-LINE]与所有资源点一样，动物可以被[采收|HARVEST]来[产出|PRODUCE][资源|RESOURCE]，但多数类型必须先由[HUNTER]、[TRAPPER]或[SURVEYOR][识别|UNIDENTIFIED]。[BLANK-LINE]所有动物都可由[HUNTER][采收|HARVEST]为[MEAT]，也可由[TRAPPER]采收为[PARCHMENT]或[CLOTH]（皮革）。除[DEER]外，所有动物都可加入你的[库存|STOCKPILE]，供[MEAT-CUTTER]、[PARCHMENT-MAKER]等高级[职业|PROFESSION]使用。[BLANK-LINE]AtG 中有 5 类动物：[BLANK-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-DEER]（总是已识别）[END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-HORSES][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-CATTLE][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-SHEEP][END-LINE][*][DEPOSIT-PIGS]
Note: Trial Common concept-help animal body; preserve raw deposit/resource/profession tags.

Original: Most [Deposits|DEPOSIT] start off Unidentified and you must have a [Clan|CLAN] in an appropriate [Profession|PROFESSION] figure out what it is before you can use it.[BLANK-LINE][Plants|PLANT] can be identified by [GATHERER:S] and [REAPER:S], [Minerals|MINERAL] by [DIGGER:S], and [Animals|ANIMAL] by [HUNTER:S] and [TRAPPER:S]. Deposits of any kind can be identified by the [SURVEYOR].
Translation: 多数[资源点|DEPOSIT]开局时尚未识别，必须让一个处于合适[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]查明其内容，才能使用。[BLANK-LINE][植物|PLANT]可由[GATHERER:S]和[REAPER:S]识别，[矿物|MINERAL]可由[DIGGER:S]识别，[动物|ANIMAL]可由[HUNTER:S]和[TRAPPER:S]识别。任意类型的资源点都可由[SURVEYOR]识别。
Note: Trial Common concept-help unidentified deposit body; preserve raw profession tags.

Original: Each [Clan|CLAN] can be [Trained|TRAIN] in one Profession, which can be [Active|ACTIVE] or [Settled|SETTLED] and grant it the ability to [Harvest|HARVEST] or refine [Resources|RESOURCE], explore the map, [Fight|WARRIOR] enemies, and more.[BLANK-LINE]The performance of Clans in a specific Profession can be improved by buying [Upgrades|UPGRADE] for it. Note that these Upgrades only apply for that specific Profession - switch to something else and the effect will be lost.
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]都可以被[训练|TRAIN]为一种职业。职业可以是[主动|ACTIVE]或[定居|SETTLED]，并赋予氏族[采收|HARVEST]或精炼[资源|RESOURCE]、探索地图、与敌人[战斗|WARRIOR]等能力。[BLANK-LINE]为特定职业购买[升级|UPGRADE]可以提高氏族在该职业中的表现。注意，这些升级只适用于该职业；切换为其他职业后效果会失去。
Note: Trial Common concept-help profession body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: There are six [Disciplines|DISCIPLINE] which [Professions|PROFESSION] and [Clans|CLAN] can belong to: [HONOR], [AGRICULTURE], [LIVESTOCK], [METALWORKING], [CRAFTING], and [DISCOVERY].[BLANK-LINE]Clans gain [Experience|XP] and can increase their [Level|LEVEL] in the Discipline their Profession belongs to, which reduces the [Turns|TURN] needed to [Train|TRAIN] it in more advanced Professions within that Discipline.
Translation: [职业|PROFESSION]和[氏族|CLAN]可归属于六种[纪律|DISCIPLINE]：[HONOR]、[AGRICULTURE]、[LIVESTOCK]、[METALWORKING]、[CRAFTING]和[DISCOVERY]。[BLANK-LINE]氏族会获得[经验|XP]，并提升其职业所属纪律的[等级|LEVEL]，从而减少在该纪律内[训练|TRAIN]更高级职业所需的[回合|TURN]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help discipline body; preserve discipline raw tags and concept identifiers.

Original: in Active [Professions|PROFESSION] leave the [SETTLEMENT] and appear on the map (as opposed to [Settled|SETTLED] Professions). Some Clans have Traits that make them prefer or dislike such Professions.
Translation: 处于主动[职业|PROFESSION]时会离开[SETTLEMENT]并出现在地图上（不同于[定居|SETTLED]职业）。有些氏族的特质会让他们偏好或厌恶这类职业。
Note: Trial Common concept-help active profession fragment; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: in Settled [Professions|PROFESSION] remain inside the [SETTLEMENT] (as opposed to [Active|ACTIVE] Professions). Some Clans have Traits that make them prefer or dislike such Professions.
Translation: 处于定居[职业|PROFESSION]时会留在[SETTLEMENT]内（不同于[主动|ACTIVE]职业）。有些氏族的特质会让他们偏好或厌恶这类职业。
Note: Trial Common concept-help settled profession fragment; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Advanced [STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]-based [Structures|STRUCTURE] last forever, but their [Production|PRODUCE] can also be greatly increased by adding a [Clan|CLAN] in the same [Profession|PROFESSION] as the Clan which originally built it (e.g. more [FARMER:S] can be added to [Farms|FARM].[BLANK-LINE]To add an Apprentice to a Structure must have an available 'Apprentice Slot'. Structures start with 0, and you must spend [BOARDS] to add slots. Assigning an actual Clan then requires spending [PARCHMENT]. Apprentices can be an expensive investment, but allow you to make your most valuable Structures incredibly productive.
Translation: 基于[STONE-BLOCKS:SINGULAR]的高级[建筑|STRUCTURE]会永久存在；如果向其中加入与原建造氏族同[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]，还能大幅提高其[产出|PRODUCE]（例如可向[农场|FARM]加入更多[FARMER:S]）。[BLANK-LINE]要向建筑添加学徒，建筑必须有可用的“学徒槽”。建筑初始没有学徒槽，必须花费[BOARDS]来增加槽位。实际分配氏族还需要花费[PARCHMENT]。学徒投入昂贵，但能让最有价值的建筑产出惊人。
Note: Trial Common concept-help apprentice body; preserve raw resource/profession tags.

Original: Ennobling a [Clan|CLAN] costs 10 [FINE-CLOTH] and 10 [ARMOR].[BLANK-LINE]Once Ennobled, a Clan permanently gains a +1 [Mood|MOOD] bonus, [Produces|PRODUCE] +5 [FAME] per turn, and immediately gains 5 [Levels|LEVEL] in a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] of your choice.[BLANK-LINE]Furthermore, some advanced [Professions|PROFESSION] (such as the [HEAVY-CAVALRY]) are themselves 'Noble', meaning that only Clans which have been Ennobled may be [Trained|TRAIN] in them.
Translation: 册封一个[氏族|CLAN]需要 10 [FINE-CLOTH]和 10 [ARMOR]。[BLANK-LINE]被册封后，氏族永久获得 +1 [心情|MOOD]加成，每回合[产出|PRODUCE] +5 [FAME]，并立即在你选择的一项[纪律|DISCIPLINE]中获得 5 个[等级|LEVEL]。[BLANK-LINE]此外，一些高级[职业|PROFESSION]（如[HEAVY-CAVALRY]）本身属于“贵族”职业，只有已被册封的氏族才能被[训练|TRAIN]为这些职业。
Note: Trial Common concept-help ennoble body; preserve resource/profession tags.

Original: Some [Professions|PROFESSION] are considered 'Social', which can affect how long it takes to [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in them or alter the effectiveness of a Clan, based on that Clan's [Traits|CLAN-TRAIT]. Most Clans don't need to care about this, but some do, so pay attention. Some Clans will actual refuse to work in Social Professions entirely![BLANK-LINE]Social Professions can be recognized by the
Translation: 有些[职业|PROFESSION]属于“社交”职业。根据氏族的[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]，这可能影响[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]所需时间，或改变氏族在该职业中的效率。多数氏族无需在意这一点，但有些氏族很在意，所以请留心。有些氏族甚至会完全拒绝从事社交职业！[BLANK-LINE]社交职业可通过
Note: Trial Common concept-help social profession body fragment; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: icon, and are exclusively found in the [HONOR] and [DISCOVERY] [Disciplines|DISCIPLINE].
Translation: 图标识别，并且只存在于[HONOR]和[DISCOVERY][纪律|DISCIPLINE]中。
Note: Trial Common concept-help social profession body fragment; preserve discipline raw tags.

Original: Warrior [Professions|PROFESSION] are [Active|ACTIVE] Professions which can fight one another (as opposed to [Civilian|CIVILIAN] Professions). Warriors can also capture Civilian [Units|UNIT], and capture or pillage [Structures|STRUCTURE].
Translation: 战士[职业|PROFESSION]是可以彼此交战的[主动|ACTIVE]职业（不同于[平民|CIVILIAN]职业）。战士还可以俘获平民[单位|UNIT]，并占领或劫掠[建筑|STRUCTURE]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help warrior body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Civilian [Professions|PROFESSION] are those which do not involve combat or fighting (as opposed to [Warrior|WARRIOR] Professions). Most are [Settled|SETTLED], but a few are [Active|ACTIVE]. Most involve economics or [Resources|RESOURCE] in some way.
Translation: 平民[职业|PROFESSION]是不涉及战斗或交战的职业（不同于[战士|WARRIOR]职业）。大多数平民职业是[定居|SETTLED]职业，但也有少数是[主动|ACTIVE]职业。它们大多以某种方式与经济或[资源|RESOURCE]相关。
Note: Trial Common concept-help civilian body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Cavalry [Units|UNIT] are expensive but powerful [Warriors|WARRIOR] which have a large amount of [Move Points|MOVE-POINT] and require [WARHORSES] to [Train|TRAIN]. Aside from their expense, the primary drawback of Cavalry is that they require 2 [Supply|SUPPLY] from their [Tile|TILE], rather than just 1 like [Infantry|INFANTRY] Units.
Translation: 骑兵[单位|UNIT]昂贵但强大，属于拥有大量[移动力|MOVE-POINT]的[战士|WARRIOR]，需要[WARHORSES]才能[训练|TRAIN]。除费用高昂外，骑兵的主要缺点是所在[地格|TILE]必须提供 2 点[补给|SUPPLY]，而非像[步兵|INFANTRY]单位那样只需 1 点。
Note: Trial Common concept-help cavalry body; preserve raw resource/profession tags.

Original: Infantry [Units|UNIT] are the basic [Warriors|WARRIOR] of AtG. They're not especially fancy, but they get the job done. They only require 1 [Supply|SUPPLY] from their [Tile|TILE], making them more flexible than their expensive [Cavalry|CAVALRY] counterparts.
Translation: 步兵[单位|UNIT]是 AtG 中基础的[战士|WARRIOR]。他们并不花哨，但足以完成任务。他们所在[地格|TILE]只需提供 1 点[补给|SUPPLY]，因此比昂贵的[骑兵|CAVALRY]更灵活。
Note: Trial Common concept-help infantry body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Each [Clan|CLAN] is made up of one or more Families. Each [Consumes|CONSUME] 0.1 [FOOD] per [Turn|TURN] (more on higher Difficulty Levels) and a new one joins every six months (12 Turns). As a game progresses your Food needs will continue accelerating, so always be thinking about how you're going to keep all of those hungry mouths fed![BLANK-LINE]Each additional Family which joins a Clan provides a 5% bonus to [Resource Production|PRODUCE] and [Combat Power|POWER], so while old, large Clans can be hard to feed they can also be quite useful in important roles.
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]由一个或多个家庭组成。每个家庭每[回合|TURN][消耗|CONSUME] 0.1 [FOOD]（高难度下更多），每六个月（12 回合）会有一个新家庭加入。随着游戏推进，食物需求会持续加速增长，所以必须时刻考虑如何养活这些饥饿的人口！[BLANK-LINE]每个加入氏族的额外家庭都会提供 5% 的[资源产出|PRODUCE]和[战力|POWER]加成，因此年长而庞大的氏族虽然难以供养，却也能在关键岗位上非常有用。
Note: Trial Common concept-help family body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Every [Clan|CLAN] has two Traits which shape which [Professions|PROFESSION] it's well-suited for, what kind of [Desires|DESIRE] it might develop, and generally how you'll want to use and manage it.[BLANK-LINE]Some Clans already start in Professions, making them useful but maybe hard to manage later when they don't want to switch [Disciplines|DISCIPLINE]. Other Clans might be inclined to commit [Crimes|CRIME], encouraging you to isolate them so they don't cause annoy anyone. There are around 100 Traits in AtG, so the number of possible combinations is quite large.
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]都有两个特质，决定其适合哪些[职业|PROFESSION]、可能产生什么样的[愿望|DESIRE]，以及你通常该如何使用和管理它。[BLANK-LINE]有些氏族开局已有职业，立刻有用，但以后若不愿切换[纪律|DISCIPLINE]，可能难以管理。另一些氏族可能倾向于犯下[罪行|CRIME]，你最好将他们隔离，避免他们骚扰他人。AtG 中约有 100 种特质，因此可能的组合非常多。
Note: Trial Common concept-help clan trait body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: A [Clan's|CLAN] Mood is normally 'Content' but this can change if they develop a [Desire|DESIRE] or have a [Trait|CLAN-TRAIT] which alters their default Mood somehow.[BLANK-LINE]A happy Clan receives a bonus to [Resource Production|PRODUCE] and [Morale|MORALE], whereas unhappy Clans suffer a penalty to these.[BLANK-LINE]Clans can temporarily be made happier (and thus productive) by spending Alcohol. A Clan's Mood drops when it has an unsatisfied [Desire|DESIRE], or when sharing a [Tile|TILE] with another Clan which has committed a [Crime|CRIME].
Translation: [氏族|CLAN]的心情通常为“满足”，但若他们产生[愿望|DESIRE]，或拥有会改变默认心情的[特质|CLAN-TRAIT]，心情就可能变化。[BLANK-LINE]快乐的氏族会获得[资源产出|PRODUCE]和[士气|MORALE]加成；不快乐的氏族则会受到惩罚。[BLANK-LINE]花费酒类可以暂时提高氏族心情，使其更有产出。当氏族有未满足的[愿望|DESIRE]，或与犯下[罪行|CRIME]的另一个氏族共享[地格|TILE]时，心情会下降。
Note: Trial Common concept-help mood body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Feuds are a special kind of [Desire|DESIRE] that two [Clans|CLAN] develop together. When this occurs both Clans will start dropping in [Mood|MOOD] until you [Punish|PUNISH] one of them. Most of the time it makes the most strategic sense to Punish the less-useful Clan, but what you choose to do is a question of conscience for you alone!
Translation: 仇怨是一种特殊的[愿望|DESIRE]，由两个[氏族|CLAN]共同产生。发生仇怨后，两个氏族的[心情|MOOD]都会开始下降，直到你[惩罚|PUNISH]其中一方。多数时候，惩罚较不重要的氏族最有战略价值，但究竟如何选择，只能由你的良心决定。
Note: Trial Common concept-help feud body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: [Units|UNIT] and [SETTLEMENT:S] can move around the map, the rate being determined by what types of [Terrain|TERRAIN] they move through. The base cost to move into a [Tile|TILE] is 1, but a [HILL] adds one extra, while a [Forest|FOREST] consumes them all.
Translation: [单位|UNIT]和[SETTLEMENT:S]可以在地图上移动，速度取决于穿越的[地形|TERRAIN]类型。进入一个[地格|TILE]的基础消耗为 1，但[HILL]会额外增加 1 点，而[森林|FOREST]会消耗全部移动力。
Note: Trial Common concept-help movement body; preserve concept identifiers and raw terrain tag.

Original: Vision is the ability to see what's on a [Tile|TILE]. Tiles in and next to your [Borders|BORDERS] are visible, as are those near your [Units|UNIT]. Some Units can see further, like [EXPLORER:S].
Translation: 视野是看见[地格|TILE]上内容的能力。你[边界|BORDERS]内及相邻的地格可见，你的[单位|UNIT]附近地格也可见。有些单位视野更远，例如[EXPLORER:S]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help vision body; preserve concept identifiers and raw profession tag.

Original: Borders, or Control, represents the [Tiles|TILE] which a player has direct ownership over and appears as a solid, colored line on the map.[BLANK-LINE]Control is very important, as within it your [Units|UNIT] always have full [Supply|SUPPLY], and it allows [Structures|STRUCTURE] to be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT], which far exceed foraging in their economic ouput.[BLANK-LINE]Control can be expanded by spending [WEAPONS] to [Fortify|FORTIFY] a Structure. [WATCHTOWER:S] are the one type of Structure which can be built outside of your Control, giving you the ability to project your power at a distance, should you be willing to make the investment.
Translation: 边界，也就是控制范围，代表玩家直接拥有的[地格|TILE]，在地图上显示为实心彩色线。[BLANK-LINE]控制范围非常重要：在其中，你的[单位|UNIT]始终拥有完整[补给|SUPPLY]，并可[建造|CONSTRUCT][建筑|STRUCTURE]；建筑的经济产出远高于临时采集。[BLANK-LINE]你可以花费[WEAPONS]来[加固|FORTIFY]建筑，从而扩展控制范围。[WATCHTOWER:S]是唯一一种可以建在控制范围外的建筑；只要愿意投入，它能让你的力量投射到远方。
Note: Trial Common concept-help borders/control body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Supply represents the basic goods needed to keep a [Unit|UNIT] functioning. During the summer most [Clans|CLAN] will be able to freely collect what they need from their [Tile|TILE], but is no longer the case once it becomes [Cold|COLD]. At this point a Unit may need to [Encamp|ENCAMP] to avoid taking [Damage|DAMAGE]. Some [Units|UNIT], like the [LIGHT-CAVALRY], actually require more than 1 Supply Point, so always keep an eye on what a Tile actually provides!
Translation: 补给代表维持[单位|UNIT]运作所需的基本物资。夏季时，多数[氏族|CLAN]都能在所在[地格|TILE]自由收集所需物资；但一旦变为[寒冷|COLD]，情况就不再如此。此时单位可能需要[扎营|ENCAMP]以避免受到[伤害|DAMAGE]。有些[单位|UNIT]，如[LIGHT-CAVALRY]，实际需要超过 1 点补给，因此务必留意地格到底能提供什么。
Note: Trial Common concept-help supply body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: [GALLEY:S] are able to transport your [SETTLEMENT] or one [Unit|UNIT] at a time over the water as 'Cargo', typically much faster than is possible by land.
Translation: [GALLEY:S]可以把你的[SETTLEMENT]或一个[单位|UNIT]作为“货物”一次运过水面，通常比陆路快得多。
Note: Trial Common concept-help galley cargo body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Each [Clan|CLAN] has 100 Health points. As they suffer Damage their [Combat Power|POWER] decreases (50% Damage = 50% Power).[BLANK-LINE]Damage can be Healed in the [SETTLEMENT] by spending [OIL] and [CLOTH].
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]有 100 点生命值。受到伤害时，其[战力|POWER]会下降（50% 伤害 = 50% 战力）。[BLANK-LINE]可以在[SETTLEMENT]中花费[OIL]和[CLOTH]治疗伤害。
Note: Trial Common concept-help health/damage body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Each [Clan|CLAN] has 100 Health points. As they suffer Damage their [Combat Power|POWER] decreases (50% Damage = 50% Power).[BLANK-LINE]Damage can be Healed in the [SETTLEMENT] by spending [OIL] and [CLOTH].
Translation: 每个[氏族|CLAN]有 100 点生命值。受到伤害时，其[战力|POWER]会下降（50% 伤害 = 50% 战力）。[BLANK-LINE]可以在[SETTLEMENT]中花费[OIL]和[CLOTH]治疗伤害。
Note: Trial Common concept-help duplicate health/damage body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: The number of Combat Experience points a [Warrior|WARRIOR] has earned are added to its [Morale|MORALE] stat, making it tougher and less inclined to [Retreat|RETREAT].
Translation: [战士|WARRIOR]获得的战斗经验点数会加入其[士气|MORALE]属性，使其更坚韧，也更不容易[撤退|RETREAT]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help combat experience body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Leaders which share the same Religion receive a [Relationship Level|RL] bonus, while those who do not receive a penalty (the exact amount being determined by each Leader's [Traits|LEADER-TRAIT]). Switching Religions can be a good way of making friends, but also enemies - abandoning the faith of another Leader can make them especially upset.
Translation: 信奉同一宗教的领袖会获得[关系等级|RL]加成，不同宗教则会受到惩罚（具体数值由各领袖的[特质|LEADER-TRAIT]决定）。改信宗教可以帮助结交朋友，也可能制造敌人；背弃另一位领袖的信仰尤其会激怒对方。
Note: Trial Common concept-help religion relationship body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Repuation is a Leader's global 'diplomatic currency' that can be spent on future diplomatic interactions with ANY Leader in order to get them to do more than they would normally be willing.[BLANK-LINE]Reputation is a valuable commodity hard to earn - doing so usually involves great risk, sacrifice, or boldness.
Translation: 声誉是领袖的全局“外交货币”，可在未来与任何领袖的外交互动中花费，使他们愿意做出通常不会接受的让步。[BLANK-LINE]声誉很有价值，也很难获得；获得声誉通常需要承担巨大风险、付出牺牲，或表现出非凡胆识。
Note: Trial Common concept-help reputation body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Influence is a Leader's 'diplomatic currency' that can be spent on future diplomatic interactions with the Leader it was earned with in order to get them to do more than they would normally be willing.[BLANK-LINE]Influence is gained in equal amount any time a Leader's [Relationship Level|RL] increases.
Translation: 影响力是领袖的“外交货币”，可在未来与获得该影响力的那位领袖互动时花费，使其愿意做出通常不会接受的让步。[BLANK-LINE]每当一位领袖的[关系等级|RL]提升时，你都会获得等量影响力。
Note: Trial Common concept-help influence body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Relationship Level is a metric measuring how much one Leader likes another.[BLANK-LINE]Having a strong Relationship Level will make another Leader less likely to attack and more inclined to positive diplomatic interactions, but important actions will also often require spending [Influence|INFLUENCE] or [Reputation|REPUTATION].[BLANK-LINE]A Leader's Relationship Level generally starts at 0 and can range from -10 to +10.
Translation: 关系等级用于衡量一位领袖对另一位领袖的好感。[BLANK-LINE]较高的关系等级会让另一位领袖不太可能攻击你，也更愿意进行正面外交互动；但重要行动通常还需要花费[影响力|INFLUENCE]或[声誉|REPUTATION]。[BLANK-LINE]领袖的关系等级通常从 0 开始，范围为 -10 到 +10。
Note: Trial Common concept-help relationship level body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Leverage is the sum total of [Relationship Level|RL], [Influence|INFLUENCE], and [Reputation|REPUTATION] being spent or used as part of one possible diplomatic exchange. Influence and Reputation can be held back, in which case they don't contribute to the overall Leverage score.
Translation: 筹码是一次可能的外交交换中投入或使用的[关系等级|RL]、[影响力|INFLUENCE]和[声誉|REPUTATION]总和。影响力和声誉可以保留不用；若保留，则不会计入总筹码值。
Note: Trial Common concept-help leverage body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: You can spend an Emissary via the Diplomacy Screen with any [Leader|LEADER] to improve your [Relationship Level|RL] with them. Emissaries are acquired by [producing|PRODUCE] [PRESTIGE].
Translation: 你可以在外交界面对任意[领袖|LEADER]派遣一名使者，以改善与其的[关系等级|RL]。使者通过[生产|PRODUCE][PRESTIGE]获得。
Note: Trial Common concept-help emissary body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: An Interaction is a single exchange between two Leaders. It might be a greeting, a threat, or a gift with a message. The types of Interactions an AI Leader chooses is based on their [Approach|APPROACH].
Translation: 互动是两位领袖之间的一次交流，可以是问候、威胁，也可以是附带信息的礼物。AI 领袖选择的互动类型取决于其[态度|APPROACH]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help interaction body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Each Leader has an Approach, which determines their diplomatic behavior. The Approach they choose is based on your [Relationship Level|RL] and their [Personality Traits|LEADER-TRAIT].
Translation: 每位领袖都有一种态度，决定其外交行为。其选择的态度取决于你们的[关系等级|RL]以及他们的[个性特质|LEADER-TRAIT]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help approach body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: A Leader can be Friends with other Leaders, which affects their behavior towards them. Being nice to a Leader's Friends can improve your relationship with the Leader, while being mean to them can hurt it.
Translation: 领袖可以与其他领袖成为朋友，这会影响其对这些领袖的行为。善待某位领袖的朋友可以改善你与该领袖的关系；苛待他们则会损害关系。
Note: Trial Common concept-help friends body; full display paragraph.

Original: A Leader can be Enemies with other Leaders, which affects their behavior towards them. Being nice to a Leader's Enemies can hurt your relationship with the Leader, while being mean to them can help improve it.
Translation: 领袖可以与其他领袖成为敌人，这会影响其对这些领袖的行为。善待某位领袖的敌人会损害你与该领袖的关系；苛待他们反而可能改善关系。
Note: Trial Common concept-help enemies body; full display paragraph.

Original: An Alliance is a permanent diplomatic arrangement which binds two [Factions|FACTION] together, and from that point on all wars either is engaged in will be joined by the other. A [Leader|LEADER] will agree to an Alliance if you have at least 5 [Leverage|LEVERAGE] with them.[BLANK-LINE]Forming an Alliance with a Faction is one of the two ways you can unlock that Faction for play in future games (the other being to conquer their [Capital|CAPITAL]).
Translation: 同盟是一项永久外交安排，会将两个[派系|FACTION]绑定在一起；从此之后，任一方卷入的所有战争，另一方都会加入。若你与一位[领袖|LEADER]至少拥有 5 点[筹码|LEVERAGE]，对方就会同意结盟。[BLANK-LINE]与一个派系结盟，是在未来游戏中解锁该派系的两种方式之一（另一种是征服其[首都|CAPITAL]）。
Note: Trial Common concept-help alliance body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Resources are the economic currency of AtG, and in conjunction with [Clans|CLAN] are essential to doing just about anything.[BLANK-LINE]There are two basic kinds of Resources: raw and refined. An example of a raw Resource is [IRON], which is [Harvested|HARVEST] from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] but can't actually be used for anything until refined into [WEAPONS] or [TOOLS].[BLANK-LINE]The most important Resource in the game is [FOOD], as without it your Clans will [Starve|STARVE]. [FAME] determines how often new Clans join you. [KNOWLEDGE] determines how fast you can [Study|STUDY] new [Professions|PROFESSION]. [TREASURE] is a versatile Resource that is especially useful for buying other Resources from [Caravans|CARAVAN]. [TIMBER] is required to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] basic [Structures|STRUCTURE], while [STONE-BLOCKS] are needed for more advanced versions which don't ever [Degrade|DEGRADE] and run out.
Translation: 资源是 AtG 的经济货币，与[氏族|CLAN]一起构成几乎一切行动的基础。[BLANK-LINE]资源分为两类：原料和加工品。[IRON]就是原料资源，可从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]中[采收|HARVEST]，但必须先精炼成[WEAPONS]或[TOOLS]才能真正使用。[BLANK-LINE]游戏中最重要的资源是[FOOD]，没有它，你的氏族会[挨饿|STARVE]。[FAME]决定新氏族加入的频率。[KNOWLEDGE]决定你[研究|STUDY]新[职业|PROFESSION]的速度。[TREASURE]用途广泛，尤其适合从[商队|CARAVAN]购买其他资源。[TIMBER]用于[建造|CONSTRUCT]基础[建筑|STRUCTURE]，更高级且不会[损耗|DEGRADE]枯竭的版本则需要[STONE-BLOCKS]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help resources body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: [Resource|RESOURCE] production is a fundamental part of At the Gates.[BLANK-LINE]Initially you will simply [Harvest|HARVEST] them from [Deposits|DEPOSIT] with [Foragers|FORAGE] or buy them from the [Caravan|CARAVAN], but once your tribe is a bit more developed you'll be able to start refining raw Resources like [IRON] into other things like [TOOLS] with the help of [Professions|PROFESSION] like the [BLACKSMITH].[BLANK-LINE]Because you have a limited number of [Clans|CLAN] it's usually best to prioritize the production of one or two Resources rather than try to do everything.
Translation: [资源|RESOURCE]生产是《At the Gates》的基础内容。[BLANK-LINE]一开始，你只需让[采集者|FORAGE]从[矿藏|DEPOSIT]中[采收|HARVEST]资源，或从[商队|CARAVAN]购买；但当部族稍有发展后，就能借助[BLACKSMITH]等[职业|PROFESSION]，把[IRON]之类原料精炼成[TOOLS]等物品。[BLANK-LINE]由于[氏族|CLAN]数量有限，通常最好优先生产一两种资源，而不是试图面面俱到。
Note: Trial Common concept-help resource production body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: [Resources|RESOURCE] can be consumed each [Turn|TURN] in two ways:[BLANK-LINE][*]Resources like [FOOD] are automatically consumed based on the number of [Clan|CLAN] [Families|FAMILY] you have.[BLANK-LINE][*]Raw Resources like [IRON] can be refined into more advanced things like [TOOLS] and are consumed in the process.[BLANK-LINE]The consumption of Resources by individual Clans can be disabled by clicking on that Clan in the Clans Screen and then clicking on the 'Stop Work' button. The consumption of 'special' [FOOD] Resources like [OLIVES] and [GRAPES] can be disabled by mousing over that Resource in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] and then clicking the 'Disable Substitution for Food' button.
Translation: [资源|RESOURCE]每[回合|TURN]会以两种方式消耗：[BLANK-LINE][*][FOOD]等资源会根据你拥有的[氏族|CLAN][家庭|FAMILY]数量自动消耗。[BLANK-LINE][*][IRON]等原料资源可被精炼成[TOOLS]等高级物品，并在过程中消耗。[BLANK-LINE]若要禁止单个氏族消耗资源，可在氏族界面点击该氏族，再点击“停止工作”按钮。若要禁止[OLIVES]和[GRAPES]等“特殊”[FOOD]资源替代食物，可在[库存|STOCKPILE]中悬停该资源，然后点击“禁用食物替代”按钮。
Note: Trial Common concept-help resource consumption body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Your stockpile of [Resources|RESOURCE] is visible on the left side of the World Screen. Once 'in the bank' you can save Resources for future purposes, or trade them away at the [Caravan|CARAVAN] for other Resources you need.[BLANK-LINE][FOOD] is a special type of Resource that other kinds of Resources like [WHEAT] and [GRAPES] automatically turn into when [Produced|PRODUCE]. [FOOD] also enters your stockpile as ['Stored Turns'|STORED-TURN], rather than a specific quantity like other Resources.
Translation: 你的[资源|RESOURCE]库存显示在世界界面左侧。资源一旦“入库”，就可以留待将来使用，或在[商队|CARAVAN]处换取你需要的其他资源。[BLANK-LINE][FOOD]是一种特殊资源，[WHEAT]和[GRAPES]等其他资源在[生产|PRODUCE]时会自动转化为食物。[FOOD]进入库存时也会以[“储存回合”|STORED-TURN]形式记录，而不是像其他资源那样记录具体数量。
Note: Trial Common concept-help stockpile body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: If you have at least 24 [FOOD] in your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] then a percentage of any further [Production|PRODUCE] will start to 'spoil'. The initial penalthy is -50%, and every every additional 12 [FOOD] another half of the remaining Production will be lost. Storing up large quantities of [FOOD] can provide security but isn't the most efficient way to run your economy.
Translation: 如果你的[库存|STOCKPILE]中至少有 24 点[FOOD]，之后继续[生产|PRODUCE]的部分食物就会开始“腐坏”。初始惩罚为 -50%；之后每增加 12 点[FOOD]，剩余产量还会再损失一半。大量储存[FOOD]能提供安全感，但并不是最高效的经济方式。
Note: Trial Common concept-help spoil body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: A [Structure|STRUCTURE] which normally [Harvests|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE] can go 'offline' and stop doing under a few different circumstances:[BLANK-LINE][*]Most [FOOD] production stops when it gets [Cold|COLD].[BLANK-LINE][*]Random [Weather|WEATHER] effects can temporarily shut down a Structure.[BLANK-LINE][*]A Structure goes offline after it's been [Pillaged|PILLAGE].
Translation: 通常会[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]的[建筑|STRUCTURE]，可能在几种情况下“停用”并停止工作：[BLANK-LINE][*]天气变[寒冷|COLD]时，大多数[FOOD]生产会停止。[BLANK-LINE][*]随机[天气|WEATHER]效果可能暂时关闭建筑。[BLANK-LINE][*]建筑被[劫掠|PILLAGE]后会停用。
Note: Trial Common concept-help offline structure body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: When an enemy [Structure|STRUCTURE] or [Clan|CLAN] is captured from another [Faction|FACTION] it is 'Occupied' for 6 turns, and during this time it will no longer [Harvest|HARVEST] [Resources|RESOURCE].
Translation: 从另一个[派系|FACTION]手中夺取敌方[建筑|STRUCTURE]或[氏族|CLAN]后，它会处于“占领”状态 6 回合；在此期间，它不再[采收|HARVEST][资源|RESOURCE]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help occupied body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: [Clans|CLAN] and [Structures|STRUCTURE] that are captured from another [Faction|FACTION] suffer a permanent -50% penalty to [Resource Production|PRODUCE] and [Morale|MORALE]. Captured Clans have a red-tinted card background.
Translation: 从另一个[派系|FACTION]手中夺取的[氏族|CLAN]和[建筑|STRUCTURE]，会永久承受 -50% 的[资源产出|PRODUCE]和[士气|MORALE]惩罚。被俘获的氏族卡牌背景会带有红色调。
Note: Trial Common concept-help captured penalty body; display-only paragraph.

Original: If your Tribe runs out of [FOOD] all of your [Clans'|CLAN] [Mood|MOOD] will drop by 1 per turn. If more than half of your clans become Resentful you will be overthrown and lose the game![BLANK-LINE]Each of your [Clans'|CLAN] [Families|FAMILY] [Consumes|CONSUME] 0.2 per [Turn|TURN], so make sure you have enough to last through the winter!
Translation: 如果部族耗尽[FOOD]，所有[氏族|CLAN]的[心情|MOOD]每回合都会下降 1。若超过半数氏族变得怨恨，你将被推翻并输掉游戏！[BLANK-LINE]每个[氏族|CLAN]的[家庭|FAMILY]每[回合|TURN][消耗|CONSUME] 0.2 点，因此务必确保食物足够撑过冬天。
Note: Trial Common concept-help starvation body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Your [SETTLEMENT] is able to Train one [Clan|CLAN] at a time, and usually in a [Profession|PROFESSION]. Professions grant a Clan the ability to [Harvest|HARVEST] or refine [Resources|RESOURCE], explore the map, [Fight|WARRIOR] enemies, and more.[BLANK-LINE]You can also Train Clans in a specific [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] by clicking on the 'Train Clan in Discipline' button in the Clans Screen. This can be a good way to get a Clan ready for a role you know you want it to serve in but don't have the Resources or have finished [Studying|STUDY] the target Profession yet. Switching a Clan from one Discipline to another is free, and you can further increase its [Level|LEVEL] in a Discipline this way, but this requires spending [PARCHMENT].[BLANK-LINE]If there's nothing you want to Train during the turn you can click the 'Skip' button in the bottom-left corner of the Clans Screen in order to finish the turn.
Translation: 你的[SETTLEMENT]一次可以训练一个[氏族|CLAN]，通常是训练其[职业|PROFESSION]。职业能让氏族[采收|HARVEST]或精炼[资源|RESOURCE]、探索地图、[作战|WARRIOR]等。[BLANK-LINE]你也可以在氏族界面点击“训练氏族纪律”按钮，让氏族接受特定[纪律|DISCIPLINE]训练。当你已经知道某个氏族将来要承担的角色，但暂时缺少资源，或尚未完成目标职业的[研究|STUDY]时，这会很有用。氏族在不同纪律之间切换是免费的，也可以用这种方式进一步提高其纪律[等级|LEVEL]，但需要花费[PARCHMENT]。[BLANK-LINE]如果本回合没有想训练的内容，可以点击氏族界面左下角的“跳过”按钮来结束回合。
Note: Trial Common concept-help training body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: You can Study one [Tech|TECH] (usually a [Profession|PROFESSION]) at a time, and once [Learned|LEARN] you can [Train|TRAIN] your [Clans|CLAN] in it.[BLANK-LINE]The rate at which you Learn a Tech is based on its [KNOWLEDGE] cost, and how much [KNOWLEDGE] you're [Producing|PRODUCE] each turn.[BLANK-LINE]To Study more advanced Professions at least one Profession from the previous 'tier' in its [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] tree must have already been Learned.
Translation: 你一次可以研究一项[科技|TECH]（通常是一个[职业|PROFESSION]），一旦[习得|LEARN]，就能用它[训练|TRAIN]你的[氏族|CLAN]。[BLANK-LINE]习得科技的速度取决于其[KNOWLEDGE]花费，以及你每回合[生产|PRODUCE]多少[KNOWLEDGE]。[BLANK-LINE]若要研究更高级的职业，其[纪律|DISCIPLINE]树中上一“层级”至少要有一个职业已经习得。
Note: Trial Common concept-help study body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Once you've [Studied|STUDY] a [Tech|TECH] long enough to accumulate the full [KNOWLEDGE] cost you may then make use of it:[BLANK-LINE][*]After Learning a [Profession|PROFESSION] you may then [Train|TRAIN] [Clans|CLAN] in it.[BLANK-LINE][*]After Learning an [Upgrade|UPGRADE] you can then spend the [Resources|RESOURCE] required to apply it to  a Clan in the associated Profession.[BLANK-LINE][*]Each of the 6 [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] Techs you can Study at the start of the game allows you to give one of your Clans 2 free [Levels|LEVEL] in that Discipline.
Translation: 当你[研究|STUDY]一项[科技|TECH]并积累到完整[KNOWLEDGE]花费后，就可以使用它：[BLANK-LINE][*]习得一个[职业|PROFESSION]后，你可以用它[训练|TRAIN][氏族|CLAN]。[BLANK-LINE][*]习得一项[升级|UPGRADE]后，你可以花费所需[资源|RESOURCE]，将其应用到对应职业的氏族身上。[BLANK-LINE][*]游戏开始时可研究的 6 项[纪律|DISCIPLINE]科技，每项都能让你的一个氏族在该纪律中免费获得 2 个[等级|LEVEL]。
Note: Trial Common concept-help learn body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: There are 3 kinds of Techs which you can [Study|STUDY] and [Learn|LEARN]:[BLANK-LINE][*][Professions|PROFESSION][BLANK-LINE][*][Upgrades|UPGRADE][BLANK-LINE][*][Discipline|DISCIPLINE] [Level-Up|LEVEL] Techs
Translation: 你可以[研究|STUDY]并[习得|LEARN] 3 类科技：[BLANK-LINE][*][职业|PROFESSION][BLANK-LINE][*][升级|UPGRADE][BLANK-LINE][*][纪律|DISCIPLINE][升级|LEVEL]科技
Note: Trial Common concept-help tech types body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: Most [Professions|PROFESSION] have 2 associated Upgrade [Techs|TECH] you can [Learn|LEARN] and then purchase for [Clans|CLAN] in that Profession. The [Resource|RESOURCE] cost of each Upgrade is different, so pay attention! Upgrades only apply for that specific Profession - switch to something else and the effect will be lost.[BLANK-LINE]Note that a Profession's Upgrade Techs can be [Studied|STUDY] in either  order - you need not finish one before the other, despite how they're stacked in the screen.[BLANK-LINE]Upon reaching [Level|LEVEL] 10 in a [Discipline|DISCIPLINE] a Clan can be given one free Upgrade.
Translation: 大多数[职业|PROFESSION]都有 2 项关联的升级[科技|TECH]，你可以[习得|LEARN]后为该职业的[氏族|CLAN]购买。每项升级所需[资源|RESOURCE]不同，请留意！升级只适用于特定职业；切换到其他职业后效果会失去。[BLANK-LINE]注意，一个职业的升级科技可以按任意顺序[研究|STUDY]；尽管它们在界面中上下叠放，你不必先完成其中一个才能研究另一个。[BLANK-LINE]当一个氏族在某项[纪律|DISCIPLINE]中达到[等级|LEVEL] 10 时，可以获得一次免费升级。
Note: Trial Common concept-help upgrades body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: A [Warrior|WARRIOR] can be given the 'Dig In' command, which allows it to accumulate a [Defense|DEFENSE] bonus on its current [Tile|TILE] of 25% per turn, up to a maximum of 100%.[BLANK-LINE]This bonus will be lost as soon as the [Unit|UNIT] moves or performs another action, so don't expect to go anywhere for a while after you Dig In.[BLANK-LINE]Digging In does not provide a Unit with [Supply|SUPPLY], making this a very dangerous action to perform outside your [Borders|BORDERS] during the [winter|COLD].
Translation: [战士|WARRIOR]可以执行“固守”命令，使其在当前[地格|TILE]每回合积累 25% 的[防御|DEFENSE]加成，最高 100%。[BLANK-LINE]一旦[单位|UNIT]移动或执行其他行动，该加成就会失去，因此固守后短时间内不要指望它继续机动。[BLANK-LINE]固守不会为单位提供[补给|SUPPLY]；在[冬季|COLD]时，于[边界|BORDERS]外执行此行动非常危险。
Note: Trial Common concept-help dig-in body; preserve concept identifiers.

Original: You can [Produce|PRODUCE] raw [Resources|RESOURCE] from [Plant|PLANT] and [Mineral|MINERAL] [Deposits|DEPOSIT] in two ways: having a [Clan|CLAN] in certain [Professions|PROFESSION] [Forage|FORAGE] it (e.g. [DIGGER]), or by [Constructing|CONSTRUCT] certain [Structures|STRUCTURE] on it (e.g. [IRON-MINE-1]).[BLANK-LINE]Harvesting a Deposit gradually [Depletes|DEGRADE] and eventually exhausts it, after which it can no longer be Harvested. Nearly all Deposits can be Harvested for 18-24 [Turns|TURN] before running out (regardless of how much is actually being Produced) with the exact figure being determined by its type (e.g. 18 for [DEPOSIT-BEEHIVE:A/AN], 24 for [DEPOSIT-IRON:A/AN]).[BLANK-LINE][Animal Herds|ANIMAL] are the third type of Deposit, and function differently. Instead of being Harvested directly like Plants and Minerals Animals can either be Foraged by [HUNTER:A/AN] or [TRAPPER] to Produce [MEAT] or [PARCHMENT], or they can be added to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE] by Constructing a [Pasture|PASTURE] on them.[BLANK-LINE]Animals in your Stockpile can be eaten directly for much more [FOOD] than a Hunter provides, and can also be used by [Settled|SETTLED] Professions like the [MEAT-CUTTER] and [PARCHMENT-MAKER] which Produce even more than that.
Translation: 你可以通过两种方式从[植物|PLANT]和[矿物|MINERAL][矿藏|DEPOSIT]中[生产|PRODUCE]原料[资源|RESOURCE]：让从事特定[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]去[采集|FORAGE]（例如[DIGGER]），或在其上[建造|CONSTRUCT]特定[建筑|STRUCTURE]（例如[IRON-MINE-1]）。[BLANK-LINE]采收矿藏会逐渐使其[枯竭|DEGRADE]并最终耗尽，之后便无法再采收。几乎所有矿藏都能采收 18-24 个[回合|TURN]后才会耗尽（无论实际[生产|PRODUCE]了多少），具体数值由类型决定（例如[DEPOSIT-BEEHIVE:A/AN]为 18，[DEPOSIT-IRON:A/AN]为 24）。[BLANK-LINE][动物群|ANIMAL]是第三类矿藏，运作方式不同。动物不能像植物和矿物那样直接采收；它们可以由[HUNTER:A/AN]或[TRAPPER]采集，以生产[MEAT]或[PARCHMENT]，也可以通过在其上建造[Pasture|PASTURE]加入你的[库存|STOCKPILE]。[BLANK-LINE]库存中的动物可以直接食用，提供远多于猎人的[FOOD]；也可以供[定居|SETTLED]职业使用，例如[MEAT-CUTTER]和[PARCHMENT-MAKER]，其产出会更高。
